---
title: "Data Simulation Keynote"
date: 2026-08-25
author: [Lisa DeBruine]
categories: [simulation]
image: ../images/faux.png
image-alt: Blue hexagon with the word FAUX
---

Lisa DeBruine will give a keynote at the 10th annual [Summer School on Statistical Methods for Linguistics and Psychology](https://vasishth.github.io/smlp2026/) in Potsdam, Germany, on the topic of data simulation.
